laudius Ptolemaeus Ptolemy was an astronomer , mathemetician and geographer in the second century A.D. He codified the Greek geocentric view of the universe, and rationalized the apparent retrograde motion of the planets using epicycles . The Ptole

motion of the planets using epicycles . The Ptolemaic system remained the accepted wisdom until the Polish scholar Copernicus proposed a heliocentric view in 1543. University of St. Andrews Ptolemy Page Contact Update Help Copyright © 1999 - UC Rege
